title: fsl-mcp sync: expose the v7 expression surface
manager: Keep fsl-mcp current with v7. When the expression language, numeric tower, strings, and where-guards land, the authoring tools must validate, explain, and where relevant evaluate them — so agents author v7 machines with full feedback instead of the tool silently lagging the grammar.
cs: Extend fsl_validate / fsl_explain / fsl_simulate to cover expressions, sized numerics, and where-guards; surface expression diagnostics. Tracks the P2 slices.
